title: Simple Block Physics Fabric
description: A port of the original Simple Block Physics mod for Fabric on newer versions of Minecraft.
body:
This is a port of the original Simple Block Physics mod for Fabric and for newer versions of the game.

This mod implements configurable, recursive structural instability. Utilizes a functional recursive search to assess block support upon adjacent removal, avoiding chunk scans.

Warning:
Structural destruction may occur. Install only in worlds where build loss is acceptable or backed up.

Features:
- Induces realistic cave-ins and building limits.
- Optimized performance via need-based physics updates.
- Prevents unsupported sky bases.
- Highly configurable support strength and iteration limits.

Mechanics
Blocks lacking vertical support within a hardness-determined range will fall. Checks trigger on placement, interaction, or adjacent updates. Unstable blocks become falling entities until landing.

This mod can work server side only on a Fabric Minecraft server. So that means vanilla clients can join your Fabric Minecraft server without the mod and it will work.

**Credit to Ferrin-Ember for the original mod!**
Link to the original mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-block-physics
